examples: He climbed stiffly from the Volkswagen.
He drove a Volkswagen, cracked jokes, and talked about beer and girls.
Even the Volkswagen rear engine car was anticipated by a 1904 patent for a cart with the horse at the rear.
Bentley (owned by Volkswagen) also relies on exports: 80% of its vehicles go abroad.
The largest ever, caught off Nova Scotia, weighed 1, 496 pounds, half the weight of a Volkswagen Beetle.
